title: Add & subtract within 20
description: Practice adding and subtracting. All numbers in these problems are 20 or less.

hints:
Let's use a number line to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/313cb1c43239202ad881bb3aa56b5d6934781f35)

First, let's jump $\blueE8$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c82abb3220d75284098c4a7302fe410c3fb6186d)

Next, let's jump $\maroonD4$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/97acc05830c36ac1023a16f30684aa028b6440c4)

The jumps end at the number $\goldE{12}$. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/befaed9ce822114d0668c565aa9a330135ca1c3a)
${}\Large\blueE8 + \maroonD4=\goldE{12}$

Let's use a number line to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1ed4d9fddf74b620e7f676c138ff4b4c09898723)

First, let's jump $\blueE3$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ec9cf6950a26debcfb6f6c951aa7c7ca7133ab12)

Next, let's jump $\maroonD{12}$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ba23e14047db0c2232fcae6d091b2b8c19e2f66b)

The jumps end at the number $\goldE{15}$. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b4da11602d6427f708585a28881f3ad7a7fbc7b5)
${}\Large\blueE3 + \maroonD{12}=\goldE{15}$

Let's use a number line to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1ed4d9fddf74b620e7f676c138ff4b4c09898723)

First, let's jump $\blueE6$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a9ce43dbf0d0818aa5ae363fd867268aece5c528)

Next, let's jump $\maroonD{7}$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/19c8dc08f385a9cab85c32a898ed1e02c890e934)

The jumps end at the number $\goldE{13}$. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a11ee6243eb0115cb2926027b0bb6bc2a08f8213)
${}\Large\goldE{13}=\blueE6+ \maroonD{7}$

Let's use a ten frame to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6b6161e4a3dc9a2c58a14b41147b7d2dac3a6daa)

First, let's show $\blueE{9}$ dots on the ten frame.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/40c07f2babec1ba03023cdbd28b251bcbc192b45)

Next, let's add $\maroonD2$ to the ten frame.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/58fd5807219a20b3ed0b9904d27a7b0801e6fa51)

There are $\goldE{11}$ total dots.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d243bb9c3e7d4c542df7e72c56f8593390231d94)
${}\Large\goldE{11}=\blueE{9} + \maroonD2$

Let's use a ten frame to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6b6161e4a3dc9a2c58a14b41147b7d2dac3a6daa)

First, let's show $\blueE{10}$ dots on the ten frame.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/eba65c418c417d6c166be750337a99a128396603)

Next, let's add $\maroonD4$ to the ten frame.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/00f81d5702e47f3538f7bd010a56b1cd08df7545)

There are $\goldE{14}$ total dots.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4589afa4068e0f7c8b2f20bc50abc0c808b18e82)
${}\Large\goldE{14}=\blueE{10} + \maroonD4$

Let's use a ten frame to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6b6161e4a3dc9a2c58a14b41147b7d2dac3a6daa)

First, let's show $\blueE{5}$ dots on the ten frame.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b69ce6783db722842d44deff9ac7be5a28158869)

Next, let's add $\maroonD8$ to the ten frame.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/86c8971052770347f6e67684248d1e78d0ad2286)

There are $\goldE{13}$ total dots.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/27e7092f25b84965a4a9c708bdd3a281d7e5cd80)
${}\Large\blueE{5} + \maroonD8 =\goldE{13}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/00cc6d4199a25cfdeb70621e00ea065806c7f7a6)

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2dab99368e96250739ee425c0f1be44638d73635)

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/93363b35dcb1e51e78a4a741f03200e3bc8da392)
${}\Large\goldE{16}=\blueE{7} + \maroonD9$

First, let's show $\blueE{13}$ using place value blocks. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0b6178b2c653580880b483685304ecdf9a2d4d10)

Next, let's add $\maroonD3$ blocks.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ded979e85242cf06f1c7eedabf350b716732db3e)

There are $\goldE{16}$ total blocks.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/93363b35dcb1e51e78a4a741f03200e3bc8da392)
${}\Large\blueE{13} + \maroonD3 = \goldE{16}$
Let's use place value blocks to help us solve.

First, let's show $\blueE{6}$ using place value blocks. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b3f08cc41c397ea9467cde23542bb7b0e034e64f)

Next, let's add $\maroonD{14}$ blocks.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/caa94a11a91d95c661867e104386699f7274dc1c)

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/21b7a2d402f9a815fa8ea1fb0849b658d460135b)
${}\Large\blueE{6} + \maroonD{14} = \goldE{20}$
Let's use groups of objects to help us solve.

First, let's show $\blueE{12}$ sharks.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a8627aa650b503948c1a9bbee6d75c8db1ad5b63)

Next, let's add $\maroonD4$ sharks.
 
![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3d3b9e81088d424b79edb27ad58df06bf765b541)

Now, there are $\goldE{16}$ total sharks.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2615b3f9ad32612e4bfdb59d2d84c162ecf008ac)
${}\Large\goldE{16}=\blueE{12} + \maroonD4$
Let's use groups of objects to help us solve.

First, let's show $\blueE{5}$ elephants.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ab7d083bbfb16537296f39aa6ee90f0deb18d078)

Next, let's add $\maroonD5$ elephants.
 
![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8d71469cc5e6d5abda179be40370510b231759be)

Now, there are $\goldE{10}$ total elephants.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/49ff92362cd8bb1ef8e4ad3a2c03f29212d7d482)
${}\Large\goldE{10}=\blueE{5} + \maroonD5$
Let's use groups of objects to help us solve.

First, let's show $\blueE{17}$ horses.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/dfba143943c220ec5e7b15245cbc4de4259910bb)

Next, let's add $\maroonD2$ horses.
 
![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ff6b4e862d34dbb368c374efe29889d66e332d53)

Now, there are $\goldE{19}$ total horses.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d25f8aa76dc77e83b66c5f0a531391a5ff544d2e)
${}\Large\blueE{17} + \maroonD2 = \goldE{19}$

Let's use a number line to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f42ccb161d0f0c9eee87fc680591c89b4f3c3bfa)

First, let's start at $\blueE{6}$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/984a00427f19ea4b5548bbdc1a1edf4e5666e51b)

Next, to subtract we move **left** $\maroonD5$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6807335ccd11330eba51f1cbe6f96f76b2987c17)

The jump ends at $\goldE1$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/dcf9921519923270e7a93cb9b8a92974a890ef43)
${}\Large\goldE{1}=\blueE{6} - \maroonD5$

Let's use a number line to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1ed4d9fddf74b620e7f676c138ff4b4c09898723)

First, let's start at $\blueE{18}$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e1198b4d470d52f64c4d7ee580f1f6508ef42540)
Next, to subtract we move **left** $\maroonD{11}$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/837833066d822eb937db56368582db448bb3f79a)
The jump ends at $\goldE7$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/516e5facf4137d05c1b4505c9691d632bda6e8bf)
${}\Large\blueE{18} - \maroonD{11} = \goldE{7}$

Let's use a number line to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bdd8f2bf94ea5ae3a510c797f8793219e79e1da4)

First, let's start at $\blueE{16}$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/54b9a3690315bc1761812929eeb5b587e2711d4b)

Next, to subtract we move **left** $\maroonD{8}$ on the number line.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/30bc158c6abcf13b4af94a0127945e7bf200dd4c)

The jump ends at $\goldE8$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/dee2997edbfed761fb5ec7b30ae665a041946c8a)
${}\Large\blueE{16} - \maroonD{8} = \goldE{8}$

Let's use a ten frame to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a22baef0d11196169c8b31c18af5cc8404afdbe6)

First, let's show $\blueE{9}$ dots on the ten frame.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5eae871a8914efc39330251ba4491d075f9e100b)

Now, let's subtract $\maroonD{3}$ dots from the $\blueE{9}$ dots.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/acb30d7010c66733be195eccb1ce91e1d67f9943)

There are $\blueE6$ dots left.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f80a01a1aa4049d25446e2ca222621065e37a474)
$\Large\blueE{9} - \maroonD{3}= \blueE6$

Let's use a ten frame to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a22baef0d11196169c8b31c18af5cc8404afdbe6)

First, let's show $\blueE{12}$ dots on the ten frame.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7f09b02b0b814cd5ed3ab1db97007f086385e4b8)

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/233089e11a9afff1662459df4b1e801e6c124c2c)

There are $\blueE5$ dots left.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5f54aa589a97a8ca980c961a33b185af21d21882)
$\Large\blueE5=\blueE{12} - \maroonD{7}$

Let's use a ten frame to help us solve.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a22baef0d11196169c8b31c18af5cc8404afdbe6)

There are $\blueE{11}$ dots left.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b0deb9ef7da7dbeb06f1871c1958e31a407db07d)
$\Large\blueE{11}=\blueE{19} - \maroonD{8}$
